description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: public university in Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: The Pennsylvania State University (Penn State or PSU) is a public state-related land-grant research university with campuses and facilities throughout Pennsylvania, United States.

description: former state in in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: South Vietnam, officially the Republic of Vietnam (RVN; Vietnamese: Việt Nam Cộng hòa, VNCH), was a country in Southeast Asia that existed from 1955 to 1975.

description: city in Đồng Nai province, Vietnam
description_wiki: Biên Hòa (Northern accent: , Southern accent: ) is a former city in Vietnam and was the capital city of Đồng Nai Province.

description: regional formation of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam
description_wiki: III Corps (Vietnamese: Quân đoàn III) was a corps of the Army of the Republic of Vietnam (ARVN), the army of the nation state of South Vietnam that existed from 1955 to 1975.

description: U.S. Army post located in Dale County, Alabama, U.S.; census designated place
description_wiki: Fort Rucker (formerly Fort Novosel) is a United States Army post located primarily in Dale County, Alabama, United States.

description: 1961 utility helicopter family by Bell
description_wiki: The Bell UH-1 Iroquois (nicknamed "Huey") is a utility military helicopter designed and produced by the American aerospace company Bell Helicopter.

description: country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Thailand, officially the Kingdom of Thailand, and formerly known as Siam until 1939, is a country located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: village in Cameroon
country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Cambodia, officially the Kingdom of Cambodia, is a country in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: Wikimedia disambiguation page
description_wiki: An Lộc may refer to several places in Vietnam, including:

description: rural district of Binh Phuoc, Vietnam
city in Vietnam
description_wiki: Tây Ninh () is a formerly provincial city in Southeastern Vietnam.

description: former U.S. Army firebase
description_wiki: Firebase Pace is a former U.S. Army firebase near the Vietnam-Cambodia border north-northwest of Tây Ninh, Vietnam.

description: 1965 attack helicopter family by Bell
description_wiki: The Bell AH-1 Cobra is a single-engined attack helicopter developed and manufactured by the American rotorcraft manufacturer Bell Helicopter.

description: scout helicopter family
description_wiki: The Hughes OH-6 Cayuse is a single-engine light helicopter designed and produced by the American aerospace company Hughes Helicopters.

description: military decoration of the United States Military
description_wiki: The Air Medal (AM) is a military decoration of the United States Armed Forces.

description: United States Armed Forces decoration award
description_wiki: The Bronze Star Medal (BSM) is a United States Armed Forces decoration awarded to members of the United States Armed Forces for either heroic achievement, heroic service, meritorious achievement, or meritorious service in a combat zone.

description: military award of the Republic of Vietnam
description_wiki: The Republic of Vietnam Campaign Medal, also known as the Vietnam Campaign Medal (Vietnamese: Chiến Dịch Bội Tinh), is a South Vietnamese military campaign medal which was created in 1949 and awarded during the First Indochina War.

description: military airfield in Vietnam
description_wiki: Bien Hoa Air Base (Vietnamese: Sân bay Biên Hòa) is a Vietnam Air Defence - Air Force (VN ADAF) military airfield located in South-Central southern Vietnam about 25 km (16 miles) from Ho Chi Minh City,  across the Dong Nai river in the northern ward of Tân Phong, and within the city of Biên Hòa within Đồng Nai Province.

description: largest city in Vietnam
description_wiki: Ho Chi Minh City (HCMC; Vietnamese: Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, IPA: [tʰaɲ˨˩ fow˦˥ ho˨˩ cɪj˦˥ mɨn˧˧] ), also known as Saigon, is the most populous municipality of Vietnam, with a population of more than 14 million in 2025.

description: American entertainer (1903–2003)
description_wiki: Lester Townes "Bob" Hope (né Leslie Townes Hope; May 29, 1903 – July 27, 2003) was a British-born American comedian, actor, entertainer and producer with a career that spanned nearly 80 years and achievements in vaudeville, network radio, television, and USO Tours.

description: United States civilian auxiliary service for military support
description_wiki: The Military Auxiliary Radio System (MARS) is a United States Department of Defense sponsored program, established as a separately managed and operated program by the United States Army and the United States Air Force.

description: military base located in Virginia, United States of America
description_wiki: Fort Eustis is a United States Army installation in Newport News, Virginia.

description: airlift helicopter series by Sikorsky
description_wiki: The Sikorsky CH-54 Tarhe is an American twin-engine heavy-lift helicopter designed by Sikorsky Aircraft for the United States Army.

description: rural district of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description_wiki: Củ Chi is a rural district of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
